label: Transparent nectarine motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Nectarine transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete nectarine fruit motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A ripe warm-orchard nectarine with smooth coral-red and orange-gold skin, subtle glossy highlights, natural speckling, a small brown stem, and fresh green leaves. Crisp botanical edges, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete fruit cutout with generous padding, no cropping.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no peach fuzz, no apple, no apricot, no bowl, no hand, no props, no sliced fruit, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Nectarine light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Nectarine, derived from the visible nectarine cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished product-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Nectarine, Nectarine Fruit, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Build the UI from coral-red nectarine skin, orange-gold flesh, leaf-green accents, warm cream surfaces, pit-brown depth, and glossy orchard highlights. The result should feel like a polished commerce, product analytics, and operational dashboard system.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command palette, sidebar navigation, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and token swatches.
Constraints: no generic orange UI, no peach fuzz, no unrelated saturated colors, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Nectarine.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Nectarine dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Nectarine that feels like the light board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished professional design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Nectarine, Nectarine Fruit, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve coral primary actions, orange-gold focus, leaf-green success, pit-brown surfaces, glossy fruit highlights, and warm orchard contrast for product dashboards and commerce workflows.
Constraints: no neon palette, no generic black UI, no unrelated colors, no tiny text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Nectarine.
